description_long: This is a pair of stylish sunglasses with a full-rim, oval-shaped frame that appears robust and slightly thick. The frame is predominantly black, with bold, colorful branding and text details on the temples, including the word 'TAIWAN' in a stylized font. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing strong sun protection and a sleek, modern look. The temples are straight and moderately thick, featuring additional white and blue graphic elements that add a sporty, urban flair. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that smoothly connects the two lenses without any visible nose pads. Overall, the glasses exude a contemporary, sporty aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: Black oval sunglasses with dark lenses and bold, colorful branding on the temples, featuring a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oval, full-rim frame and dark-tinted lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, thick temple with 'TAIWAN' branding and graphic details.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the curvature of the temples and the overall frame width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mirrored branding and additional white graphic on the temple.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has an oval geometry with a full-rim structure, moderately thick and robust, giving a sporty and contemporary appearance. The temples are straight and substantial, contributing to the sturdy look, and the overall style is modern with urban influences.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark gray to black, fully tinted, and opaque, providing strong sun protection with no visible gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, integrated saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thick, and feature bold, colorful branding with the word 'TAIWAN' and additional white and blue graphic elements, giving them a distinctive, sporty look.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo or insignia is visible on both temples, printed in a stylized font with the word 'TAIWAN' and additional graphic elements.
